response: Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), founded in 1861, is currently ranked #1 among universities. It boasts a highly selective admissions process with a 3.9 % acceptance rate, serves about 11,500 students, and employs 1,069 faculty members, including 98 Nobel laureates. With an annual tuition of $57,590 and an endowment of $24.6 billion, MIT stands as one of the world’s most prestigious and well‑funded institutions.
